jobs.title: PSS Analyst - THE NORTH FACE
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: The North Face EMEA is looking for an outstanding PSS Analyst to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Focus of this role will be on Retail Partner and Concession channel, with the key objective to create and implement new ways of working to elevate our Merchandise Planning and Trading aligned with the DTC business. You will be responsible for merchandise trading including all inventory management and Retail KPIs management and cross-functional go-to-market alignment and performance tracking. Also, you will play a key role to further strengthen our Retail Partner business in ITALY and GAS region, working closely with our Retail and Concession manager throughout the selling campaign. How you will make a difference - Lead and evolve best-in-class digital Merchandising Planning process fully aligned with our DTC strategy, positioning and with the seasonal merchandising strategy; - Full ownership to manage the performance of the defined assortment, working closely with a cross-functional team dedicated to B&M (Buyers and Retail Partner managers) ; - Work alongside our TNG buying team and PSS managers to manage seasonal, monthly and weekly intake requirements; - Working on Inventory Management and coverage optimization at product/size level and across our DCs, with focus on trading performance and stock level optimization, delivering against The North Face B&M and financial objectives; - Full alignment with overall go-to-market calendar to ensure seamless execution and strong accelerated growth; - Working in partnership with Buying, PSS and Sales Ops team on the development of yearly and seasonal merchandise financial plans across Revenue, COGS, Discounts, Margins, ASP and Units - Set standards of trading and buying processes and deliver best practices to be shared across our cross-functional teams, proactively proposing continuous improvements in processes and tools in collaboration with DTC counterparts and VF Central Team to reach trading excellence and best-in-class inventory management execution; - Constantly striving for innovation and to optimise ways of working by contributing in setting up new processes, tools and report. What you need to succeed? - 3+ yrs. of relevant work experience with proven track record in Merchandising Planning, trading or equivalent Business Planning/Trading role - Language skills: fluent in English and Italian - Relevant Merchandise Planning and analysis experience within a fast-paced retail business - Deep understanding of the fast-paced B&M environment and merchandising success factors for Retails - Outstanding understanding of all the Retail KPIs and how they are influencing stores’ P&L - Excellent knowledge of Excel. Knowledge of Access, SAP and BI systems is a plus. - Excellent analytical skills - Outstanding business- and financial acumen - Consumer-first, data savvy and brand-driven mindset - Highly performance driven and result-oriented team player who is getting things done - High maturity in managing organisational complexity and effective communication - Strategic and operational decision-making A formal education and subsequent University Bachelor or Master’s degree in related fields are nice to have, but we are most interested in your total experience and professional achievements. What is in it for you? - Playing a key role to accelerate our B&M growth within one of our leading brands - Joining an ambitious Retail and Concession team embedded into The North Face and VF, one of the largest, globally leading multi-brand organisations with great long-term career opportunities - Purpose-led, international, fun and challenging working environment We're in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That's why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we're the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - 50% discount on all VF brands Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose-led, performance driven company, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Join the North Face Family The North Face was built on a love for the outdoors and the desire to enable all types of exploration, for all people, from their backyards to the Himalayas. Over the last 50 years we've lived by our "true north," the belief that exploration has the power to change us, to challenge us and to help us see the world from new perspectives. To help ignite a global movement of outdoor exploration, love for the natural world and an unwavering commitment to protect it, we welcome and encourage new participants to the outdoors. We extend our reach through support of non-profit organizations, establishing programs that connect participants with close-to-home recreation opportunities, and creating a connection with young leaders, inspiring them to explore and conserve. As we enter our sixth decade, we pledge to: - Empower exploration and the thrill of the unknown for as many people as possible - Protect the places where we live, play, and operate - Evolve the way we make our products by improving our environmental performance and social responsibility in the supply chain Our Parent Company, VF Corporation VF is one of the world's largest apparel, footwear and accessories companies connecting people to the lifestyles, activities and experiences they cherish through our family of iconic outdoor, active and workwear brands. At the heart of our journey lies our company-wide purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It's the reason we come to work every day. It's a commitment shared by our global associates across all brands. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! Please submit your application in English, as that's our common language! R-20230303-0011

titleByLocale.en: PSS Analyst - THE NORTH FACE
titleByLocale.it: Analista PSS - THE NORTH FACE
titleByLocale.fr: PSS Analyste - THE NORTH FACE

descriptionByLocale.it: The North Face EMEA sta cercando un Analista PSS eccezionale da inserire nel nostro team con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. Il focus di questo ruolo sarà sul canale Retail Partner e Concession, con l'obiettivo chiave di creare e implementare nuovi modi di lavoro per elevare la nostra Pianificazione Merchandising e Trading in linea con il business DTC. Sarai responsabile del trading della merce, inclusa tutta la gestione dell'inventario e dei KPI Retail, nonché dell'allineamento cross‑funzionale go‑to‑market e del monitoraggio delle performance. Inoltre, giocherai un ruolo chiave nel rafforzare ulteriormente il nostro business Retail Partner in ITALIA e nella regione GAS, collaborando a stretto contatto con il nostro Retail e Concession manager durante l'intera campagna di vendita. Come farai la differenza - Guidare ed evolvere un processo di Pianificazione Merchandising digitale di classe mondiale, pienamente allineato con la nostra strategia DTC, il posizionamento e la strategia stagionale di merchandising; - Assumere la piena responsabilità di gestire la performance dell'assortimento definito, lavorando a stretto contatto con un team cross‑funzionale dedicato a B&M (Buyer e Retail Partner manager); - Lavorare al fianco del nostro team di acquisto TNG e dei manager PSS per gestire i requisiti di intake stagionali, mensili e settimanali; - Gestire l'Inventory Management e l'ottimizzazione della copertura a livello di prodotto/taglia e attraverso i nostri DC, con focus sulla performance di trading e sull'ottimizzazione dei livelli di stock, raggiungendo gli obiettivi finanziari e B&M di The North Face; - Allineamento completo con il calendario go‑to‑market globale per garantire un'esecuzione fluida e una crescita accelerata; - Collaborare con i team Buying, PSS e Sales Ops nello sviluppo dei piani finanziari di merce annuali e stagionali su Revenue, COGS, Sconti, Margini, ASP e Unità; - Definire standard di processi di trading e acquisto e diffondere le best practice tra i team cross‑funzionali, proponendo proattivamente miglioramenti continui in processi e strumenti in collaborazione con i colleghi DTC e il VF Central Team per raggiungere l'eccellenza nel trading e nella gestione dell'inventario; - Ricercare costantemente l'innovazione e ottimizzare i modi di lavoro contribuendo alla creazione di nuovi processi, strumenti e report. Cosa ti serve per avere successo? - Oltre 3 anni di esperienza lavorativa rilevante con comprovata esperienza in Pianificazione Merchandising, trading o ruolo equivalente di Business Planning/Trading; - Competenze linguistiche: fluente in inglese e italiano; - Esperienza pertinente in Pianificazione Merchandising e analisi in un contesto retail ad alta velocità; - Profonda comprensione dell'ambiente B&M veloce e dei fattori di successo del merchandising per i Retail; - Eccellente comprensione di tutti i KPI Retail e di come influenzino il P&L dei negozi; - Ottima conoscenza di Excel. La conoscenza di Access, SAP e sistemi BI è un plus; - Eccellenti capacità analitiche; - Spiccata acume business e finanziario; - Mentalità consumer‑first, data‑savvy e orientata al brand; - Elevata propensione al risultato, giocatore di squadra orientato al raggiungimento degli obiettivi; - Alta maturità nella gestione della complessità organizzativa e nella comunicazione efficace; - Capacità decisionale strategica e operativa. Un'istruzione formale e una laurea triennale o magistrale in ambiti correlati sono gradite, ma siamo più interessati alla tua esperienza complessiva e ai risultati professionali. Cosa c'è per te? - Giocare un ruolo chiave per accelerare la crescita B&M di uno dei nostri brand leader; - Entrare a far parte di un ambizioso team Retail e Concession integrato in The North Face e VF, una delle più grandi organizzazioni multi‑brand a livello globale, con grandi opportunità di carriera a lungo termine; - Ambiente di lavoro internazionale, divertente e stimolante, guidato da uno scopo; - Siamo nel business di liberare il potenziale umano, guidati dalle idee, dall'energia e dall'impegno delle nostre persone. Per questo offriamo benefit completi che promuovono benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario per tutti gli associati VF. Quando si tratta di benefit, offriamo il pacchetto totale: - Una cultura di feedback costruttivo dove rispetto e integrità guidano le nostre azioni; - Un ambiente internazionale inclusivo dove persone di background, stili di vita e nazionalità diverse amano lavorare insieme; - Far parte di un brand lifestyle iconico in un'organizzazione multi‑brand e multi‑paese; - Palestra in sede con iniziative per salute e benessere; - Sconto del 50% su tutti i brand VF. Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity Come azienda orientata allo scopo e alle performance, ci impegniamo a favorire una cultura di appartenenza basata su rispetto, connessione, apertura e autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un luogo di lavoro che celebra la diversità dei nostri associati, permettendo loro di portare il proprio sé autentico al lavoro ogni giorno. Unisciti alla famiglia The North Face The North Face è nata dall'amore per l'outdoor e dal desiderio di consentire a tutti di esplorare, da giardini di casa alle vette dell'Himalaya. Negli ultimi 50 anni abbiamo vissuto secondo il nostro "true north", la convinzione che l'esplorazione abbia il potere di cambiare, sfidare e farci vedere il mondo da nuove prospettive. Per accendere un movimento globale di esplorazione outdoor, amore per la natura e impegno incrollabile a proteggerla, accogliamo e incoraggiamo nuovi partecipanti all'outdoor. Estendiamo la nostra influenza supportando organizzazioni non profit, creando programmi che collegano i partecipanti a opportunità ricreative vicine a casa e creando connessioni con giovani leader, ispirandoli a esplorare e conservare. Entrando nel nostro sesto decennio, ci impegniamo a: - Dare potere all'esplorazione e all'emozione dell'ignoto per il maggior numero possibile di persone; - Proteggere i luoghi in cui viviamo, giochiamo e operiamo; - Evolvere il modo in cui realizziamo i nostri prodotti migliorando le performance ambientali e la responsabilità sociale nella catena di fornitura. La nostra azienda madre, VF Corporation VF è una delle più grandi aziende al mondo di abbigliamento, calzature e accessori, collegando le persone a stili di vita, attività ed esperienze che amano attraverso la nostra famiglia di brand iconici outdoor, attivi e workwear. Al centro del nostro percorso c'è lo scopo aziendale: alimentiamo movimenti di stili di vita sostenibili e attivi per il benessere delle persone e del pianeta. Questo è il nostro scopo. È il motivo per cui veniamo al lavoro ogni giorno. È un impegno condiviso dai nostri associati globali in tutti i brand. Il nostro scopo ci unisce e ci spinge a perseguire i nostri obiettivi, insieme. Questa è la nostra chiamata. Scopri di più su vfc.com Se ti è piaciuto quello che hai letto e vuoi unirti al nostro team, ci piacerebbe sentirti! Per favore
descriptionByLocale.en: The North Face EMEA is looking for an outstanding PSS Analyst to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Focus of this role will be on Retail Partner and Concession channel, with the key objective to create and implement new ways of working to elevate our Merchandise Planning and Trading aligned with the DTC business. You will be responsible for merchandise trading including all inventory management and Retail KPIs management and cross-functional go-to-market alignment and performance tracking. Also, you will play a key role to further strengthen our Retail Partner business in ITALY and GAS region, working closely with our Retail and Concession manager throughout the selling campaign. How you will make a difference - Lead and evolve best-in-class digital Merchandising Planning process fully aligned with our DTC strategy, positioning and with the seasonal merchandising strategy; - Full ownership to manage the performance of the defined assortment, working closely with a cross-functional team dedicated to B&M (Buyers and Retail Partner managers) ; - Work alongside our TNG buying team and PSS managers to manage seasonal, monthly and weekly intake requirements; - Working on Inventory Management and coverage optimization at product/size level and across our DCs, with focus on trading performance and stock level optimization, delivering against The North Face B&M and financial objectives; - Full alignment with overall go-to-market calendar to ensure seamless execution and strong accelerated growth; - Working in partnership with Buying, PSS and Sales Ops team on the development of yearly and seasonal merchandise financial plans across Revenue, COGS, Discounts, Margins, ASP and Units - Set standards of trading and buying processes and deliver best practices to be shared across our cross-functional teams, proactively proposing continuous improvements in processes and tools in collaboration with DTC counterparts and VF Central Team to reach trading excellence and best-in-class inventory management execution; - Constantly striving for innovation and to optimise ways of working by contributing in setting up new processes, tools and report. What you need to succeed? - 3+ yrs. of relevant work experience with proven track record in Merchandising Planning, trading or equivalent Business Planning/Trading role - Language skills: fluent in English and Italian - Relevant Merchandise Planning and analysis experience within a fast-paced retail business - Deep understanding of the fast-paced B&M environment and merchandising success factors for Retails - Outstanding understanding of all the Retail KPIs and how they are influencing stores’ P&L - Excellent knowledge of Excel. Knowledge of Access, SAP and BI systems is a plus. - Excellent analytical skills - Outstanding business- and financial acumen - Consumer-first, data savvy and brand-driven mindset - Highly performance driven and result-oriented team player who is getting things done - High maturity in managing organisational complexity and effective communication - Strategic and operational decision-making A formal education and subsequent University Bachelor or Master’s degree in related fields are nice to have, but we are most interested in your total experience and professional achievements. What is in it for you? - Playing a key role to accelerate our B&M growth within one of our leading brands - Joining an ambitious Retail and Concession team embedded into The North Face and VF, one of the largest, globally leading multi-brand organisations with great long-term career opportunities - Purpose-led, international, fun and challenging working environment We're in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That's why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we're the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - 50% discount on all VF brands Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose-led, performance driven company, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Join the North Face Family The North Face was built on a love for the outdoors and the desire to enable all types of exploration, for all people, from their backyards to the Himalayas. Over the last 50 years we've lived by our "true north," the belief that exploration has the power to change us, to challenge us and to help us see the world from new perspectives. To help ignite a global movement of outdoor exploration, love for the natural world and an unwavering commitment to protect it, we welcome and encourage new participants to the outdoors. We extend our reach through support of non-profit organizations, establishing programs that connect participants with close-to-home recreation opportunities, and creating a connection with young leaders, inspiring them to explore and conserve. As we enter our sixth decade, we pledge to: - Empower exploration and the thrill of the unknown for as many people as possible - Protect the places where we live, play, and operate - Evolve the way we make our products by improving our environmental performance and social responsibility in the supply chain Our Parent Company, VF Corporation VF is one of the world's largest apparel, footwear and accessories companies connecting people to the lifestyles, activities and experiences they cherish through our family of iconic outdoor, active and workwear brands. At the heart of our journey lies our company-wide purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It's the reason we come to work every day. It's a commitment shared by our global associates across all brands. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! Please submit your application in English, as that's our common language! R-20230303-0011
descriptionByLocale.de: The North Face EMEA sucht einen herausragenden PSS Analyst, der unser Team in Stabio, Schweiz, verstärkt. Der Fokus dieser Rolle liegt auf dem Retail Partner und Concession Channel, mit dem Ziel, neue Arbeitsweisen zu schaffen und umzusetzen, um unsere Merchandise Planning und Trading Aktivitäten im Einklang mit dem DTC‑Geschäft zu verbessern. Sie sind verantwortlich für das Merchandise Trading inklusive aller Inventar‑ und Retail‑KPI‑Verwaltung sowie für die abteilungsübergreifende Go‑to‑Market‑Ausrichtung und das Performance‑Tracking. Zudem spielen Sie eine Schlüsselrolle beim weiteren Ausbau unseres Retail‑Partner‑Geschäfts in ITALIEN und der GAS‑Region und arbeiten eng mit unserem Retail‑ und Concession‑Manager während der gesamten Verkaufskampagne zusammen. Wie Sie den Unterschied machen – Lead und Weiterentwicklung eines erstklassigen digitalen Merchandising‑Planning‑Prozesses, der vollständig mit unserer DTC‑Strategie, Positionierung und der saisonalen Merchandising‑Strategie abgestimmt ist; – Vollständige Verantwortung für die Performance des definierten Sortiments, in enger Zusammenarbeit mit einem funktionsübergreifenden Team für B&M (Buyer und Retail‑Partner‑Manager); – Zusammenarbeit mit unserem TNG‑Einkaufsteam und den PSS‑Managern, um saisonale, monatliche und wöchentliche Intake‑Anforderungen zu steuern; – Arbeit am Inventory Management und der Optimierung der Abdeckung auf Produkt‑/Größen‑Ebene sowie über unsere DCs hinweg, mit Fokus auf Trading‑Performance und Bestandsoptimierung, um die B&M‑ und Finanzziele von The North Face zu erreichen; – Vollständige Abstimmung mit dem übergeordneten Go‑to‑Market‑Kalender, um eine reibungslose Umsetzung und starkes, beschleunigtes Wachstum sicherzustellen; – Zusammenarbeit mit Buying, PSS und Sales Ops bei der Entwicklung jährlicher und saisonaler Merchandise‑Finanzpläne für Umsatz, COGS, Rabatte, Margen, ASP und Stückzahlen; – Festlegung von Standards für Trading‑ und Einkaufsprozesse und Verbreitung von Best Practices über alle funktionsübergreifenden Teams, proaktive Vorschläge für kontinuierliche Prozess‑ und Tool‑Verbesserungen in Zusammenarbeit mit DTC‑Partnern und dem VF Central Team, um Trading‑Exzellenz und erstklassige Inventar‑Management‑Ausführung zu erreichen; – Ständige Innovationsbereitschaft und Optimierung der Arbeitsweisen durch Mitgestaltung neuer Prozesse, Tools und Reports. Was Sie mitbringen sollten? – Mehr als 3 Jahre relevante Berufserfahrung mit nachweislicher Erfolgsbilanz im Merchandising Planning, Trading oder einer vergleichbaren Business‑Planning/Trading‑Rolle; – Sprachkenntnisse: fließend in Englisch und Italienisch; – Relevante Erfahrung in Merchandise Planning und Analyse in einem schnelllebigen Einzelhandelsumfeld; – Tiefes Verständnis des schnellen B&M‑Umfelds und der Erfolgsfaktoren im Merchandising für Retail; – Hervorragendes Verständnis aller Retail‑KPIs und deren Einfluss auf die P&L der Stores; – Exzellente Excel‑Kenntnisse. Kenntnisse in Access, SAP und BI‑Systemen sind von Vorteil; – Ausgeprägte analytische Fähigkeiten; – Hervorragendes Geschäfts‑ und Finanzverständnis; – Consumer‑First‑Mindset, datenaffin und markenorientiert; – Hochleistungs‑ und ergebnisorientierter Teamplayer, der Dinge erledigt; – Hohe Reife im Umgang mit organisatorischer Komplexität und effektiver Kommunikation; – Strategische und operative Entscheidungsfähigkeit. Ein formaler Abschluss (Bachelor oder Master) in einem relevanten Fachgebiet ist wünschenswert, aber wir legen mehr Wert auf Ihre Gesamterfahrung und beruflichen Erfolge. Was wir Ihnen bieten? – Eine Schlüsselrolle zur Beschleunigung unseres B&M‑Wachstums bei einer unserer führenden Marken; – Einstieg in ein ambitioniertes Retail‑ und Concession‑Team innerhalb von The North Face und VF, einem der größten, global führenden Multi‑Brand‑Unternehmen mit langfristigen Karrieremöglichkeiten; – Zweckorientiertes, internationales, spaßiges und herausforderndes Arbeitsumfeld; – Wir befähigen Menschen, ihr Potenzial zu entfalten, getrieben von Ideen, Energie und Engagement. Deshalb bieten wir umfassende Benefits, die das mentale, physische und finanzielle Wohlbefinden aller VF‑Mitarbeiter unterstützen. Wenn es um Benefits geht, bieten wir das Rundum‑Paket: – Eine unterstützende Feedback‑Kultur, in der Respekt und Integrität unser Handeln leiten; – Ein inklusives internationales Umfeld, in dem Menschen unterschiedlicher Hintergründe, Lebensstile und Nationalitäten gern zusammenarbeiten; – Teil eines ikonischen Lifestyle‑Brands in einer Multi‑Brand‑ und Multi‑Country‑Organisation zu sein; – Vor Ort Fitnessstudio mit Gesundheits‑ und Wellness‑Initiativen; – 50 % Rabatt auf alle VF‑Marken. Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity Als zweck‑ und leistungsorientiertes Unternehmen streben wir eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit an, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir verpflichten uns, ein Arbeitsumfeld zu schaffen und zu erhalten, das die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeitenden feiert und es ihnen ermöglicht, jeden Tag ihr authentisches Selbst einzubringen. Werden Sie Teil der North Face Family The North Face wurde aus der Liebe zur Natur und dem Wunsch heraus gegründet, allen Menschen – vom heimischen Garten bis zum Himalaya – Exploration zu ermöglichen. In den letzten 50 Jahren lebten wir nach unserem „true north“, dem Glauben, dass Exploration uns verändert, herausfordert und uns neue Perspektiven eröffnet. Um eine globale Bewegung für Outdoor‑Exploration, Liebe zur Natur und unerschütterliches Engagement für deren Schutz zu entfachen, heißen wir neue Outdoor‑Teilnehmer willkommen und ermutigen sie. Wir erweitern unsere Reichweite durch Unterstützung von Non‑Profit‑Organisationen, etablieren Programme, die Teilnehmer mit nahegelegenen Freizeitmöglichkeiten verbinden, und schaffen Verbindungen zu jungen Führungskräften, die wir zum Erkunden und Bewahren inspirieren. Im sechsten Jahrzehnt unseres Bestehens verpflichten wir uns zu: - Mehr Menschen die Möglichkeit zu geben, zu erkunden und das Unbekannte zu erleben; - Die Orte zu schützen, an denen wir leben, spielen und arbeiten; - Die Art und Weise zu verändern, wie wir Produkte herstellen, indem wir unsere Umweltleistung und soziale Verantwortung in der Lieferkette verbessern. Unser Mutterunternehmen, VF Corporation VF ist eines der weltweit größten Unternehmen für Bekleidung, Schuhe und Accessoires und verbindet Menschen mit den Lebensstilen, Aktivitäten und Erlebnissen, die sie lieben, über unsere Familie ikonischer Outdoor‑, Aktiv‑ und Arbeitsmarken. Im Zentrum unserer Reise steht unser Unternehmenszweck: Wir treiben Bewegungen für nachhaltige und aktive Lebensstile zum Wohle von Menschen und Planet voran. Das ist unser Zweck. Er ist der Grund, warum wir jeden Tag zur Arbeit kommen. Er ist ein von allen unseren globalen Mitarbeitenden geteiltes Commitment. Unser Zweck vereint uns und führt uns dazu, gemeinsam unsere Ziele zu verfolgen. Das ist unser Aufruf. Erfahren Sie mehr auf vfc.com Wenn Ihnen das gefallen hat und Sie Teil unseres Teams werden möchten, freuen wir uns, von Ihnen zu hören! Bitte reichen Sie Ihre Bewerbung in Englisch ein, da dies unsere gemeinsame Sprache ist! R-20230303-0011
descriptionByLocale.fr: The North Face EMEA recherche un Analyste PSS exceptionnel pour rejoindre notre équipe basée à Stabio, en Suisse. Le rôle sera centré sur le canal Retail Partner et Concession, avec pour objectif principal de créer et mettre en œuvre de nouvelles méthodes de travail afin d’élever notre planification merchandising et trading en alignement avec le business DTC. Vous serez responsable du trading de la marchandise, incluant toute la gestion des stocks et des KPI Retail, ainsi que de l’alignement go‑to‑market inter‑fonctionnel et du suivi des performances. Vous jouerez également un rôle clé pour renforcer davantage notre activité Retail Partner en ITALIE et dans la région GAS, en travaillant étroitement avec notre responsable Retail et Concession tout au long de la campagne de vente. Comment vous ferez la différence – Diriger et faire évoluer un processus de Merchandising Planning digital de classe mondiale, pleinement aligné avec notre stratégie DTC, notre positionnement et la stratégie merchandising saisonnière ; – Prendre la pleine responsabilité de la performance de l’assortiment défini, en collaboration étroite avec une équipe inter‑fonctionnelle dédiée au B&M (acheteurs et responsables Retail Partner) ; – Travailler aux côtés de notre équipe d’achat TNG et des managers PSS pour gérer les besoins d’intake saisonniers, mensuels et hebdomadaires ; – Gérer l’Inventory Management et l’optimisation de la couverture au niveau produit/taille et à travers nos DC, en se concentrant sur la performance trading et l’optimisation des niveaux de stock, afin d’atteindre les objectifs financiers et B&M de The North Face ; – Alignement complet avec le calendrier go‑to‑market global pour assurer une exécution fluide et une croissance accélérée forte ; – Travailler en partenariat avec les équipes Buying, PSS et Sales Ops sur le développement des plans financiers merchandising annuels et saisonniers (Revenue, COGS, Remises, Marges, ASP et Unités) ; – Définir les standards des processus de trading et d’achat et diffuser les meilleures pratiques à travers nos équipes inter‑fonctionnelles, en proposant proactivement des améliorations continues des processus et des outils en collaboration avec les homologues DTC et le VF Central Team pour atteindre l’excellence du trading et une exécution de gestion des stocks de classe mondiale ; – Rechercher constamment l’innovation et optimiser les modes de travail en contribuant à la mise en place de nouveaux processus, outils et rapports. Ce qu’il vous faut pour réussir ? – Plus de 3 ans d’expérience pertinente avec un historique prouvé en Merchandising Planning, trading ou rôle équivalent de Business Planning/Trading ; – Compétences linguistiques : anglais et italien courants ; – Expérience pertinente en planification merchandising et analyse dans un environnement retail à rythme rapide ; – Compréhension approfondie de l’environnement B&M rapide et des facteurs de succès du merchandising pour le Retail ; – Excellente compréhension de tous les KPI Retail et de leur influence sur le P&L des magasins ; – Excellente maîtrise d’Excel. La connaissance d’Access, SAP et des systèmes BI est un plus ; – Excellentes compétences analytiques ; – Sens aigu des affaires et de la finance ; – Mentalité consumer‑first, orientée données et marque ; – Joueur d’équipe très performant, orienté résultats et capable de faire avancer les choses ; – Grande maturité dans la gestion de la complexité organisationnelle et la communication efficace ; – Prise de décision stratégique et opérationnelle. Un diplôme universitaire (Bachelor ou Master) dans un domaine pertinent est un atout, mais nous nous intéressons surtout à votre expérience globale et à vos réalisations professionnelles. Ce que nous vous offrons ? – Un rôle clé pour accélérer notre croissance B&M au sein d’une de nos marques leaders ; – Rejoindre une équipe Retail et Concession ambitieuse intégrée à The North Face et VF, l’une des plus grandes organisations multi‑marques et leaders mondiaux, avec d’excellentes opportunités de carrière à long terme ; – Un environnement de travail international, ludique et stimulant, guidé par un but ; – Nous sommes dans le business de libérer le potentiel humain, guidés par les idées, l’énergie et l’engagement de nos équipes. C’est pourquoi nous offrons des avantages complets qui favorisent le bien‑être mental, physique et financier de tous les associés VF. En matière d’avantages, nous proposons le package complet : – Une culture de feedback constructif où le respect et l’intégrité guident nos actions ; – Un environnement international inclusif où des personnes de divers horizons, styles de vie et nationalités aiment travailler ensemble ; – Faire partie d’une marque lifestyle emblématique au sein d’une organisation multi‑marques et multi‑pays ; – Salle de sport sur site avec initiatives santé et bien‑être ; – 50 % de remise sur toutes les marques VF. Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity En tant qu’entreprise à vocation et performance, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture d’appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l’ouverture et l’authenticité. Nous nous engageons à construire et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos associés, leur permettant d’apporter leur vrai moi chaque jour. Rejoignez la famille The North Face The North Face a été créée par l’amour de la nature et le désir de permettre à tous d’explorer, des jardins domestiques aux sommets de l’Himalaya. Depuis 50 ans, nous vivons selon notre « true north », la conviction que l’exploration a le pouvoir de nous changer, de nous challenger et de nous faire voir le monde sous de nouvelles perspectives. Pour déclencher un mouvement mondial d’exploration en plein air, d’amour pour la nature et d’engagement inébranlable à la protéger, nous accueillons et encourageons de nouveaux participants à l’extérieur. Nous étendons notre portée en soutenant des organisations à but non lucratif, en créant des programmes qui connectent les participants à des opportunités de loisirs proches de chez eux, et en créant des liens avec de jeunes leaders, les inspirant à explorer et à conserver. En entrant dans notre sixième décennie, nous nous engageons à : - Donner à un maximum de personnes le pouvoir d’explorer et de ressentir le frisson de l’inconnu ; - Protéger les lieux où nous vivons, jouons et opérons ; - Faire évoluer notre façon de fabriquer nos produits en améliorant nos performances environnementales et notre responsabilité sociale dans la chaîne d’approvisionnement. Notre maison mère, VF Corporation VF est l’une des plus grandes entreprises mondiales d’habillement, de chaussures et d’accessoires, reliant les personnes aux styles de vie, activités et expériences qu’elles chérissent à travers notre famille de marques emblématiques outdoor, actives et workwear. Au cœur de notre parcours se trouve notre raison d’être : nous alimentons des mouvements de styles de vie durables et actifs pour le bien des personnes et de la planète. C’est notre raison d’être. C’est la raison pour laquelle nous venons travailler chaque jour. C’est un engagement partagé par nos associés du monde entier à travers toutes les marques. Notre raison d’être nous unit et nous pousse à poursuivre nos objectifs, ensemble. C’est notre appel. En savoir plus sur vfc.com Si vous avez aimé ce que vous avez lu et souhaitez rejoindre notre équipe, nous aimerions avoir de vos nouvelles ! Veuillez soumettre votre candidature en anglais, car c’est notre langue commune ! R-20230303-0011

jobs.title: Associate, Merchandising Operations (Timberland)
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Timberland EMEA is looking for an exceptional Associate Merchandiser on a 6‑month fixed‑term contract , to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland.

## Let’s Talk about the Role
A day in the life of the Associate Merchandiser at Timberland looks a little like this. You will play a key role in supporting the merchandising team across seasonal milestones, ensuring accuracy of product information, coordination of assortments, and alignment with brand strategy. You will manage systems, samples, seasonal reporting, and performance analysis to help build consumer‑right assortments. You will also contribute to cross‑functional collaboration, supporting product development, pricing updates, and assortments across regions. Part of the role includes leading operational processes linked to the Eastpak project , driving coordination, planning, and consistency across global milestones.

## Let’s break down that day‑in‑the‑life a bit more
- Own accurate management of product attributes.
- Manage HTT assortment for the assigned collection & GBA (Bags, Women Outlet + support on Mainline Women), ensuring alignment with FTW, Accessories & Marketing.
- Define ideal merchandising mix and seasonal priorities in alignment with the merchandising lead.
- Support the merchandising team through data entry, sample organization, and seasonal reporting.
- Track and analyze product performance to identify bestsellers, slow movers, and consumer trends.
- Assist in building seasonal line plans, ensuring accurate product details and updates.
- Partner with cross‑functional teams to support product development, pricing updates, and assortment alignment.
- Manage system updates, including pricing, SKU management, and product information.
- Support in‑season business tracking, enabling timely actions based on marketplace needs.
- Manage ad‑hoc projects to grow autonomy in project management.
- Present the collection to regional merchandising leads during key GTM milestones.

## EASTPAK PROJECT
- Coordinate processes and alignment across all key milestones with the Eastpak team.
- Support the creation of the line, ensuring alignment with Timberland’s and Eastpak’s brand strategy.
- Lead calendar coordination and sample purchasing.
- Work closely with AMER, EMEA, APAC, the Eastpak team, and Global TBL partners to deliver market‑relevant assortments.
- Evaluate global line, trends, and competition to identify white‑space opportunities, including revenue and margin.
- Support pricing and lifecycle management.
- Conduct in‑season analysis with regional merchants and planners, identifying opportunities (including OMU/SMU).
- Lead PLM implementation for Bags and ensure ongoing Enovia maintenance.

## How You Will Make a Difference
You will achieve this by:
- Maintaining accuracy and clarity across all merchandising systems and product information.
- Working closely with merchandising leadership to support strategic and operational priorities.
- Collaborating effectively with cross‑functional partners to enable smooth seasonal execution.
- Bringing strong analytical skills to identify opportunities and improve line performance.
- Demonstrating high attention to detail and ownership across processes and deliverables.
- Supporting the alignment of seasonal assortments through clear communication and structured documentation.
- Staying connected to market needs, consumer insights, and internal milestones to anticipate trends and react quickly.

## Skills for Success While formal education in merchandising, business, marketing or a related field is a plus, what matters most is a few years of experience in merchandising, product management, or a related area. The foundational skills required are:
- Strong analytical skills and understanding of product performance.
- Solid knowledge of merchandising processes and product lifecycle.
- Excellent organizational skills and ability to manage multiple priorities.
- Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
- Ability to work collaboratively across global and regional teams.
- Strong communication skills, written and verbal.
- Proficiency with merchandising systems (PLM, Enovia preferred) and Excel.
- Proactive, solution‑oriented mindset.
- Flexibility to support seasonal workload peaks.

## What’s in it For You
- A supportive, feedback‑based culture guided by respect and integrity.
- An inclusive, international environment where diverse backgrounds and experiences are valued.
- The opportunity to be part of an iconic lifestyle brand within a global, multi‑brand organization.
- On‑site gym with health and well‑being initiatives.
- A discount card offering 50% off all VF brands.
- Break‑out areas with complimentary hot drinks.

## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity
As a purpose‑led, performance‑driven company, we foster a culture of belonging based on respect, openness, connection, and authenticity. We celebrate diversity and support equal opportunities for all associates and applicants. If this sounds like you and you’re ready to join our team, we’d love to hear from you! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029

descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione Timberland EMEA sta cercando un eccezionale Associate Merchandiser con contratto a tempo determinato di 6 mesi, da inserire nel nostro team con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. ## Parliamo del ruolo Una giornata nella vita dell'Associate Merchandiser presso Timberland è più o meno così. Avrai un ruolo chiave nel supportare il team di merchandising attraverso le tappe stagionali, garantendo l'accuratezza delle informazioni di prodotto, il coordinamento degli assortimenti e l'allineamento con la strategia del brand. Gestirai sistemi, campioni, report stagionali e analisi delle performance per costruire assortimenti orientati al consumatore. Contribuirai anche alla collaborazione cross‑funzionale, supportando lo sviluppo prodotto, gli aggiornamenti di prezzo e gli assortimenti tra le regioni. Parte del ruolo include la conduzione di processi operativi legati al progetto Eastpak, guidando coordinamento, pianificazione e coerenza tra le tappe globali. ## Analizziamo più nel dettaglio la giornata - Gestire con precisione gli attributi di prodotto. - Gestire l’assortimento HTT per la collezione assegnata e GBA (Bags, Women Outlet + supporto su Mainline Women), assicurando l’allineamento con FTW, Accessori e Marketing. - Definire il mix di merchandising ideale e le priorità stagionali in accordo con il responsabile merchandising. - Supportare il team di merchandising tramite inserimento dati, organizzazione dei campioni e report stagionali. - Monitorare e analizzare le performance di prodotto per identificare best‑seller, articoli a bassa rotazione e tendenze dei consumatori. - Assistere nella costruzione dei piani di linea stagionali, garantendo dettagli di prodotto accurati e aggiornamenti. - Collaborare con team cross‑funzionali per supportare lo sviluppo prodotto, gli aggiornamenti di prezzo e l’allineamento degli assortimenti. - Gestire gli aggiornamenti di sistema, inclusi prezzo, gestione SKU e informazioni prodotto. - Supportare il monitoraggio del business in‑season, consentendo azioni tempestive basate sulle esigenze del mercato. - Gestire progetti ad‑hoc per aumentare l’autonomia nella gestione dei progetti. - Presentare la collezione ai responsabili merchandising regionali durante le tappe chiave del GTM. ## PROGETTO EASTPAK - Coordinare i processi e l’allineamento tra tutte le tappe chiave con il team Eastpak. - Supportare la creazione della linea, garantendo l’allineamento con la strategia di brand di Timberland ed Eastpak. - Guidare il coordinamento del calendario e l’acquisto dei campioni. - Lavorare a stretto contatto con AMER, EMEA, APAC, il team Eastpak e i partner Global TBL per fornire assortimenti rilevanti per il mercato. - Valutare la linea globale, le tendenze e la concorrenza per identificare opportunità di spazio bianco, inclusi ricavi e margine. - Supportare la gestione dei prezzi e del ciclo di vita. - Condurre analisi in‑season con merchant e planner regionali, identificando opportunità (incluse OMU/SMU). - Guidare l’implementazione PLM per Bags e garantire la manutenzione continua di Enovia. ## Come farai la differenza Raggiungerai questo obiettivo: - Mantenendo accuratezza e chiarezza in tutti i sistemi di merchandising e nelle informazioni di prodotto. - Lavorando a stretto contatto con la leadership del merchandising per supportare le priorità strategiche e operative. - Collaborando efficacemente con partner cross‑funzionali per garantire un’esecuzione stagionale fluida. - Portando solide capacità analitiche per identificare opportunità e migliorare le prestazioni della linea. - Dimostrando alta attenzione ai dettagli e senso di responsabilità nei processi e nei deliverable. - Supportando l’allineamento degli assortimenti stagionali tramite comunicazione chiara e documentazione strutturata. - Restando connessi alle esigenze di mercato, insight dei consumatori e tappe interne per anticipare le tendenze e reagire rapidamente. ## Competenze per il successo Sebbene una formazione formale in merchandising, business, marketing o un campo correlato sia un plus, ciò che conta di più è qualche anno di esperienza in merchandising, gestione prodotto o area correlata. Le competenze fondamentali richieste sono: - Solide capacità analitiche e comprensione delle prestazioni del prodotto. - Conoscenza approfondita dei processi di merchandising e del ciclo di vita del prodotto. - Eccellenti capacità organizzative e capacità di gestire più priorità. - Elevata attenzione ai dettagli e precisione. - Capacità di lavorare in collaborazione con team globali e regionali. - Forti capacità comunicative, scritte e verbali. - Padronanza dei sistemi di merchandising (PLM, Enovia preferito) ed Excel. - Mentalità proattiva e orientata alla soluzione. - Flessibilità nel supportare i picchi di lavoro stagionali. ## Cosa ti offre il ruolo - Una cultura di supporto e feedback basata su rispetto e integrità. - Un ambiente inclusivo e internazionale dove background e esperienze diverse sono valorizzate. - L’opportunità di far parte di un brand lifestyle iconico all’interno di un’organizzazione globale multi‑brand. - Palestra in sede con iniziative per salute e benessere. - Carta sconto con il 50 % di sconto su tutti i brand VF. - Aree break‑out con bevande calde gratuite. ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity Come azienda guidata da uno scopo e orientata alle performance, promuoviamo una cultura di appartenenza basata su rispetto, apertura, connessione e autenticità. Celebriamo la diversità e supportiamo pari opportunità per tutti i dipendenti e candidati. Se ti riconosci in questo profilo e sei pronto a unirti al nostro team, ci piacerebbe sentirti! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029
descriptionByLocale.de: ## Beschreibung Timberland EMEA sucht einen außergewöhnlichen Associate Merchandiser für einen befristeten Vertrag von 6 Monaten, der unser Team in Stabio, Schweiz, verstärkt. ## Lassen Sie uns über die Rolle sprechen Ein Tag im Leben des Associate Merchandiser bei Timberland sieht ungefähr so aus. Sie übernehmen eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Unterstützung des Merchandising‑Teams über saisonale Meilensteine hinweg, sorgen für die Genauigkeit von Produktinformationen, die Koordination von Sortiments und die Ausrichtung an der Markenstrategie. Sie verwalten Systeme, Muster, saisonale Berichte und Leistungsanalysen, um verbraucherorientierte Sortimente zu erstellen. Sie tragen zudem zur bereichsübergreifenden Zusammenarbeit bei, unterstützen Produktentwicklung, Preisupdates und Sortimente in den Regionen. Teil der Rolle ist die Leitung operativer Prozesse im Zusammenhang mit dem Eastpak‑Projekt, das Koordination, Planung und Konsistenz über globale Meilensteine hinweg vorantreibt. ## Lassen Sie uns den Tagesablauf genauer betrachten - Präzise Verwaltung von Produkteigenschaften. - Verwaltung des HTT‑Sortiments für die zugewiesene Kollektion & GBA (Bags, Women Outlet + Unterstützung für Mainline Women) und Sicherstellung der Abstimmung mit FTW, Accessoires & Marketing. - Definition des idealen Merchandising‑Mixes und saisonaler Prioritäten in Abstimmung mit dem Merchandising‑Lead. - Unterstützung des Merchandising‑Teams durch Dateneingabe, Musterorganisation und saisonale Berichterstattung. - Verfolgung und Analyse der Produktperformance zur Identifizierung von Bestsellern, Langsamverkaufern und Verbrauchertrends. - Mitwirkung beim Aufbau saisonaler Linienpläne, Gewährleistung genauer Produktdetails und Updates. - Zusammenarbeit mit bereichsübergreifenden Teams zur Unterstützung von Produktentwicklung, Preisupdates und Sortimentsabstimmung. - Verwaltung von Systemupdates, einschließlich Preisgestaltung, SKU‑Management und Produktinformationen. - Unterstützung des In‑Season‑Business‑Trackings, um zeitnahe Maßnahmen basierend auf Marktbedürfnissen zu ermöglichen. - Verwaltung von Ad‑hoc‑Projekten zur Steigerung der Eigenständigkeit im Projektmanagement. - Präsentation der Kollektion vor regionalen Merchandising‑Leads bei wichtigen GTM‑Meilensteinen. ## EASTPAK‑PROJEKT - Koordination von Prozessen und Abstimmung über alle wichtigen Meilensteine hinweg mit dem Eastpak‑Team. - Unterstützung bei der Erstellung der Linie, um die Markenstrategie von Timberland und Eastpak abzustimmen. - Leitung der Kalenderkoordination und Musterbeschaffung. - Enge Zusammenarbeit mit AMER, EMEA, APAC, dem Eastpak‑Team und den Global‑TBL‑Partnern, um marktrelevante Sortimente zu liefern. - Bewertung der globalen Linie, Trends und Konkurrenz, um White‑Space‑Opportunitäten einschließlich Umsatz und Marge zu identifizieren. - Unterstützung von Preis‑ und Lebenszyklus‑Management. - Durchführung von In‑Season‑Analysen mit regionalen Merchants und Planern, Identifizierung von Chancen (inkl. OMU/SMU). - Leitung der PLM‑Implementierung für Bags und Sicherstellung der fortlaufenden Enovia‑Wartung. ## Wie Sie einen Unterschied machen Sie erreichen das durch: - Aufrechterhaltung von Genauigkeit und Klarheit in allen Merchandising‑Systemen und Produktinformationen. - Enge Zusammenarbeit mit der Merchandising‑Leitung zur Unterstützung strategischer und operativer Prioritäten. - Effektive Zusammenarbeit mit bereichsübergreifenden Partnern für einen reibungslosen saisonalen Ablauf. - Einbringen starker analytischer Fähigkeiten zur Identifizierung von Chancen und Verbesserung der Linienperformance. - Hohe Detailgenauigkeit und Ownership über Prozesse und Deliverables. - Unterstützung der Abstimmung saisonaler Sortimente durch klare Kommunikation und strukturierte Dokumentation. - Verbundenheit mit Marktbedürfnissen, Verbraucher‑Insights und internen Meilensteinen, um Trends vorauszusehen und schnell zu reagieren. ## Erfolgs‑Kompetenzen Obwohl ein formaler Abschluss in Merchandising, Business, Marketing oder einem verwandten Bereich von Vorteil ist, zählt vor allem mehrjährige Erfahrung im Merchandising, Produktmanagement oder einem ähnlichen Bereich. Die grundlegenden erforderlichen Fähigkeiten sind: - Starke analytische Fähigkeiten und Verständnis der Produktperformance. - Fundiertes Wissen über Merchandising‑Prozesse und den Produktlebenszyklus. - Ausgezeichnete Organisationsfähigkeiten und Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten zu managen. - Hohe Detailgenauigkeit und Präzision. - Fähigkeit, kollaborativ mit globalen und regionalen Teams zu arbeiten. - Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, schriftlich und mündlich. - Beherrschung von Merchandising‑Systemen (PLM, Enovia bevorzugt) und Excel. - Proaktive, lösungsorientierte Denkweise. - Flexibilität zur Unterstützung von Arbeitsspitzen in Saisonzeiten. ## Was Sie erwartet - Eine unterstützende, feedback‑basierte Kultur, die von Respekt und Integrität geleitet wird. - Ein inklusives, internationales Umfeld, in dem unterschiedliche Hintergründe und Erfahrungen geschätzt werden. - Die Möglichkeit, Teil einer ikonischen Lifestyle‑Marke innerhalb einer globalen Multi‑Brand‑Organisation zu sein. - Vor Ort Gym mit Gesundheits‑ und Wellness‑Initiativen. - Rabattkarte mit 50 % Rabatt auf alle VF‑Marken. - Break‑Out‑Bereiche mit kostenlosen Heißgetränken. ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity Als zweck‑ und leistungsorientiertes Unternehmen fördern wir eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit, die auf Respekt, Offenheit, Verbindung und Authentizität basiert. Wir feiern Vielfalt und unterstützen Chancengleichheit für alle Mitarbeitenden und Bewerber. Wenn Sie sich angesprochen fühlen und bereit sind, unserem Team beizutreten, freuen wir uns, von Ihnen zu hören! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description Timberland EMEA recherche un(e) Associate Merchandiser exceptionnel(le) pour un contrat à durée déterminée de 6 mois, afin de rejoindre notre équipe basée à Stabio, Suisse. ## Parlons du rôle Une journée dans la vie de l’Associate Merchandiser chez Timberland ressemble à ceci. Vous jouerez un rôle clé dans le soutien de l’équipe merchandising à travers les jalons saisonniers, en assurant l’exactitude des informations produit, la coordination des assortiments et l’alignement avec la stratégie de la marque. Vous gérerez les systèmes, les échantillons, les rapports saisonniers et l’analyse des performances pour créer des assortiments orientés consommateur. Vous contribuerez également à la collaboration transversale, en soutenant le développement produit, les mises à jour de prix et les assortiments entre les régions. Une partie du rôle comprend la conduite de processus opérationnels liés au projet Eastpak, en pilotant la coordination, la planification et la cohérence à travers les jalons globaux. ## Détaillons davantage le quotidien - Gérer avec précision les attributs produit. - Gérer l’assortiment HTT pour la collection assignée & GBA (Bags, Women Outlet + support sur Mainline Women), en assurant l’alignement avec FTW, Accessoires & Marketing. - Définir le mix merchandising idéal et les priorités saisonnières en accord avec le responsable merchandising. - Soutenir l’équipe merchandising via la saisie de données, l’organisation des échantillons et les rapports saisonniers. - Suivre et analyser la performance produit pour identifier best‑sellers, articles à faible rotation et tendances consommateurs. - Aider à la construction des plans de ligne saisonniers, en garantissant des détails produit précis et des mises à jour. - Collaborer avec les équipes transverses pour soutenir le développement produit, les mises à jour de prix et l’alignement des assortiments. - Gérer les mises à jour du système, incluant prix, gestion des SKU et informations produit. - Soutenir le suivi business in‑season, permettant des actions rapides basées sur les besoins du marché. - Gérer des projets ad‑hoc pour gagner en autonomie dans la gestion de projet. - Présenter la collection aux responsables merchandising régionaux lors des jalons clés du GTM. ## PROJET EASTPAK - Coordonner les processus et l’alignement sur tous les jalons clés avec l’équipe Eastpak. - Soutenir la création de la ligne, en assurant l’alignement avec la stratégie de marque de Timberland et d’Eastpak. - Piloter la coordination du calendrier et l’achat des échantillons. - Travailler en étroite collaboration avec AMER, EMEA, APAC, l’équipe Eastpak et les partenaires Global TBL pour livrer des assortiments pertinents pour le marché. - Évaluer la ligne globale, les tendances et la concurrence afin d’identifier des opportunités de white‑space, incluant revenu et marge. - Soutenir la gestion des prix et du cycle de vie. - Réaliser des analyses in‑season avec les marchands et planificateurs régionaux, identifiant des opportunités (incluant OMU/SMU). - Piloter la mise en œuvre PLM pour les Bags et assurer la maintenance continue d’Enovia. ## Comment vous ferez la différence Vous y parviendrez en : - Maintenant précision et clarté dans tous les systèmes merchandising et les informations produit. - Travaillant étroitement avec la direction merchandising pour soutenir les priorités stratégiques et opérationnelles. - Collaborant efficacement avec les partenaires transverses pour permettre une exécution saisonnière fluide. - Apportant de fortes compétences analytiques pour identifier les opportunités et améliorer la performance de la ligne. - Faisant preuve d’une grande attention aux détails et d’un sens de la responsabilité sur les processus et livrables. - Soutenant l’alignement des assortiments saisonniers grâce à une communication claire et une documentation structurée. - Restant connecté aux besoins du marché, aux insights consommateurs et aux jalons internes pour anticiper les tendances et réagir rapidement. ## Compétences pour réussir Bien qu’un diplôme en merchandising, commerce, marketing ou domaine similaire soit un atout, ce qui compte avant tout est quelques années d’expérience en merchandising, gestion de produit ou domaine connexe. Les compétences fondamentales requises sont : - Solides compétences analytiques et compréhension de la performance produit. - Connaissance approfondie des processus merchandising et du cycle de vie du produit. - Excellentes compétences organisationnelles et capacité à gérer plusieurs priorités. - Grande attention aux détails et précision. - Capacité à travailler en collaboration avec des équipes globales et régionales. - Fortes compétences en communication, écrites et orales. - Maîtrise des systèmes merchandising (PLM, Enovia préféré) et Excel. - Esprit proactif, orienté solution. - Flexibilité pour soutenir les pics de charge saisonnière. ## Ce que vous offre le poste - Une culture de soutien et de feedback guidée par le respect et l’intégrité. - Un environnement inclusif et international où les parcours et expériences divers sont valorisés. - L’opportunité de faire partie d’une marque lifestyle emblématique au sein d’une organisation mondiale multi‑marques. - Salle de sport sur site avec initiatives santé et bien‑être. - Carte de réduction offrant 50 % de remise sur toutes les marques VF. - Espaces de pause avec boissons chaudes gratuites. ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity En tant qu’entreprise guidée par un but et axée sur la performance, nous favorisons une culture d’appartenance basée sur le respect, l’ouverture, la connexion et l’authenticité. Nous célébrons la diversité et soutenons l’égalité des chances pour tous les collaborateurs et candidats. Si cela vous correspond et que vous êtes prêt(e) à rejoindre notre équipe, nous serions ravis d’avoir de vos nouvelles ! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029

jobs.title: Allocator Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com .

## Informazioni chiave
- Start date: June 1st, 2026
- Duration: 12 months , full-time
- Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF
- Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland
- Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case)

## Requisiti di idoneità
- You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026
- You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship

## Mansioni
We are looking for a Allocator intern to join VANS within VF EMEA Internship Program. In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team:
- By taking an active role in analysing performance and sales trend.
- Monitoring deliveries, maintaining adequate stock levels.
- Taking care of replenishment / initial allocation for O&O EMEA Stores.
- Developing and maintaining reports and tools finding the best way to make them efficient and useful for the team.

## Profilo
You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being:
- Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills.
- Passionate for numbers with strong analytical skills: accuracy and attention to details is a must.
- Proficient in Microsoft Excel. Knowledge of any BI platform will be considered as a plus (eg: Power BI).
- Eager to learn and face up new challenges.
- Proactive in order to achieve yours and your team goals.
- First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus

## Cosa offriamo
At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below:
- Learn about Vans’ trends and main logics of Retail Merchandising.
- Learn logics of inventory management, sales analysis, and allocation strategies.
- Learn to work with a wide team of internal stakeholder.

## Programma di tirocinio
The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including:
- Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project
- One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands
- Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership

## Benefici
We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy:
- Hybrid working policy
- 50% discount on VF brands
- On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives
- Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks
- Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location
- A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together.

## Contatto
Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team: - Durch aktive Mitarbeit bei der Analyse von Leistungs- und Verkaufstrends. - Überwachung von Lieferungen und Aufrechterhaltung angemessener Lagerbestände. - Verantwortung für Nachschub / Erstzuweisung für O&O EMEA Stores. - Entwicklung und Pflege von Berichten und Tools, um sie effizient und nützlich für das Team zu machen. ## Profil You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being: - Fließend in Englisch mit ausgezeichneten mündlichen und schriftlichen Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - Leidenschaft für Zahlen mit starken analytischen Fähigkeiten: Genauigkeit und Detailgenauigkeit sind ein Muss. - Versiert in Microsoft Excel. Kenntnisse einer BI-Plattform werden als Plus angesehen (z. B.: Power BI). - Lernbegierig und bereit, neue Herausforderungen anzunehmen. - Proaktiv, um eigene und Teamziele zu erreichen. - Erste Erfahrungen wie andere Praktika, außerschulische Aktivitäten werden als Plus betrachtet. ## Was wir bieten At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Erfahren Sie mehr über die Trends von Vans und die grundlegenden Logiken des Retail Merchandising. - Lernen Sie die Logiken des Bestandsmanagements, der Verkaufsanalyse und der Zuweisungsstrategien. - Lernen Sie, mit einem breiten Team interner Stakeholder zusammenzuarbeiten. ## Praktikumsprogramm The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. jobs.title: Retail Marketing Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Marketing Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com .

## Informazioni chiave
- Start date: June 1st, 2026
- Duration: 12 months , full-time
- Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF
- Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland
- Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case)

## Requisiti di idoneità
- You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026
- You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship

## Mansioni
As Retail Marketing intern, you’ll help shape in-store activations while learning how brand strategy comes to life at the point of sale. Here’s what you’ll be responsible for:
- Support the planning and execution of retail marketing and in-store activations, helping bring Vans’ brand, culture, and stories to life in stores.
- Coordinate with cross-functional teams (Retail, Creative, Visual Merchandising, and other Marketing functions) to gather all tactics needed to deliver engaging in-store events and consumer activations.
- Assist with retail marketing operations across EMEA, supporting different store formats (Owned, Partner, Outlet).
- Contribute to training and communication materials for store teams ahead of key activations or events.
- Help execute retail campaigns and store activations, including in-store visuals, digital retail communications, and event-related materials.
- Provide day-to-day support on cross-functional needs, such as copy coordination, translations, and event logistics.
- Work closely with DTC (Direct To Consumer) Retail teams (district and store managers) to support smooth execution at store level.
- Support the creation of briefs and post-activation recaps, capturing learnings and best practices for future in-store initiatives.
- Support basic budget tracking and purchase order follow-up in coordination with the team.

## Competenze richieste
You are a natural facilitator who helps ideas turn into real, on-the-ground experiences:
- Project-minded and well-organized – You enjoy working in project mode, juggling multiple activations, and coordinating across Creative, Retail, Visual Merchandising, and Marketing teams.
- Curious about retail marketing and in-store activations – You’re eager to understand how brand storytelling, consumer experience, and store execution come together in a physical retail environment.
- Culturally connected – You have a strong eye for engaging content and a genuine affinity with action sports, street culture, and the Vans DNA (skate, music, art, and self-expression).
- Detail-driven yet hands-on – You care about quality, follow through on execution, and take pride in getting the small details right for events and store activations.
- Proactive and solution-oriented -You show initiative, adapt quickly, and keep things moving even when plans evolve or challenges arise.
- Collaborative by nature – You thrive in team environments, share information openly, and contribute positively to collective success.
- Comfortable working with data and tools – You enjoy using tools like Excel and PowerPoint to track projects, support reporting, and tell clear, visual stories.
- A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business, or a related field is nice to have, but we are most interested in your mindset, curiosity, and relevant experiences.

## Cosa offriamo
By joining the Vans Retail Marketing team, you’ll gain real, hands-on experience working on in-store activations and events for an iconic global action sports brand. During your internship, you will:
- Work closely with international and cross-functional teams across Retail, Marketing, Creative, and Visual Merchandising.
- Contribute to real retail activations and in-store events, from idea to execution.
- Learn how brand strategy translates into physical retail experiences that engage consumers.
- Receive exposure to retail marketing operations across EMEA, including different store formats.
- Benefit from on-the-job learning, mentoring, and collaboration with experienced professionals in the industry.

## Programma di internship
The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including:
- Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project
- One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands
- Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership

## Benefici
Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy:
- Hybrid working policy
- 50% discount on VF brands
- On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives
- Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks
- Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location
- A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together.

## Contatto
Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0013
